pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J. It’s a bit intense being in a room with everyone competing for the same thing, isn't it? How are you holding up?
Hey J, I'm D. It's definitely a lot to take in, but I'm doing alright. Just trying to keep my head in the game. How are you feeling about it all?
I'm feeling pretty focused, honestly. I've got people back home counting on me, so I’m just trying to stay sharp. What about you—what's your main motivation for being here?
Same here, honestly. I’ve got people I care about back home too, and I’m determined to bring something back to help them out.
I respect that. It definitely makes the stakes feel a lot more real when it's for them. Have you thought much about how to handle the group dynamic once the game actually starts?
A little bit. It's going to be a balancing act between cooperating and looking out for our own interests. I'm mostly just trying to get a feel for everyone first. How are you planning to play it?
Pretty much the same. I'd prefer to be collaborative, but I'm staying cautious. I think finding a few reliable people to stick with might be the best way to navigate the chaos.
I completely agree. Having a small group you can actually trust would make this a lot easier. I’m definitely open to looking out for each other if our goals align.
That sounds like a plan. Since we're both doing this for our people back home, I think we’re already on the same page. Let's keep an eye out for each other.
For sure. It’s good to have someone I can trust in here. Let's make it happen. I'm going to go see who else is around.
Sounds good, D. Good luck with the others, I'll be around if you need anything.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It was a pleasure playing with you!
It was a pleasure playing with you too! I'm glad we both walked away with a fair share.
